title: Carousel Class
description: Represents a carousel that displays slides of content with navigation buttons.

parameters.name: element
parameters.description: The element for which to create carousel control.

properties.name: readonly element: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the root element of the control.

properties.name: readonly elementChildren: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element that contains the slide elements.

properties.name: readonly elementPrev: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the navigation button element used to move backward.

properties.name: readonly elementNext: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the navigation button element used to move forward.

properties.name: readonly elementIndicators: HTMLElement
properties.description: Gets the element that contains indicator elements.

properties.name: readonly focused: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the control have input focus.

properties.name: readonly items: CarouselItem[]
properties.description: Gets an array containing all items.

properties.name: readonly activeIndex: number
properties.description: Gets the index of the currently active item.

properties.name: readonly running: boolean
properties.description: Gets a value indicating whether the carousel is automatically cycling.

properties.name: interval: number
properties.description: Gets or sets the time interval between automatic item cycles.

events.name: carouselchange
events.description: The change event is fired when the user modifies and commits the checked.

fields.name: carousel: Carousel
fields.description: A reference to the control to which the event was originally dispatched.

fields.name: oldItem: CarouselItem
fields.description: The previous slide before it changes.
